company.name: Rocking (PTY) LTD
company.registeredOffice: Unit A3, Westlake Square, Westlake Drive, Westlake, 7945, South Africa

doc.projectIntro: This quote covers the supply of a Dell Pro Micro QCM1250 compact desktop PC for Interland — an Intel Core i5 micro-form-factor machine with 16GB RAM, a 512GB SSD, Windows 11 Pro and a 3-year Dell ProSupport warranty. Supply only. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.description: Dell Pro Micro QCM1250 — i5-14500T / 16GB / 512GB / Win 11 Pro
items.detail: Micro form factor. Intel Core i5-14500T (14-core, up to 4.8GHz) · 16GB (1×16GB) DDR5 5600 · 512GB SSD · Intel integrated graphics · Intel Wi-Fi 6E AX211 + Bluetooth · Dell MS116 mouse + KB216 keyboard · Windows 11 Pro 64-bit · 3-year Dell ProSupport.

doc.summaryNote: Supply only — setup, imaging and on-site installation can be quoted separately if required.
terms: This quote is valid for 14 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
Supply only — setup and configuration can be quoted separately on request.
Pricing is subject to exchange-rate movement and OEM price changes, and is confirmed at order placement.
Delivery lead time is subject to Dell stock availability.
Payment is due in full prior to order placement.
Hardware remains the property of Rocking until paid in full.

banking.branch: Blue Route Mall, Tokai Road, Tokai, 7945
banking.reference: Please use quote number as payment reference.

internal.note: Pinnacle BTO008_QCM1250 via Nicholus de Jager — R20,130 ex VAT. Standard 15% markup (client ex VAT = supplier incl VAT).
